products_list.name: 18k Gold Heritage Pin
products_list.description:
Description: Celebrate life’s most precious milestones with our solid 18k gold pins. Meticulously crafted from high-purity, radiant 18k yellow gold, these pins feature delicate hand-engraved details and traditional protective charms. A time-honored Middle Eastern tradition, these pins make the perfect blessing gift for newborns, baby showers, and birthdays, designed to be pinned onto clothing or cradles. A beautiful token of love, protection, and heritage that will be cherished for a lifetime.

Material: 18k Solid Yellow Gold
Included Items: Please refer to the product image for the exact matching items included in this set (typically includes the pin along with any dangling charms or coordinate details as pictured).
Craftsmanship: Artisan-detailed engraving with polished gold dangling accents.
Occasion: Ideal for newborn baby gifts, baby showers, blessings, and traditional milestones.
